title: cyperus moutona
intro: Cyperus moutona, also known as Kondo's papyrus or Cyperus papyrus, is a species of sedge that is native to tropical and subtropical regions of Africa. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Cyperus moutona include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Cyperus moutona can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, making it accessible for use in herbal medicine.
